heading: Statement of purpose
label: 3321 Statement of purpose
text: It is the purpose of this subchapter to promote research and extension activities of the institutions hereinafter referred to in , and to coordinate their efforts as an integral part in the implementation of the National Aquaculture Act of 1980 ( et seq.) by encouraging landowners, individuals, and commercial institutions to develop aquaculture production and facilities and sound aquacultural practices that will, through research and technology transfer programs, provide for the increased production and marketing of aquacultural food products.section 3322(b) of this title16 U.S.C. 2801
notes: References in TextThe National Aquaculture Act of 1980, referred to in text, is , , , which is classified generally to chapter 48 (§ 2801 et seq.) of Title 16, Conservation. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 96–36294 Stat. 1198section 2801 of Title 16Sept. 26, 1980
